projects.title: Digital Clothing Store
projects.description: A small online store created for original digital designs themed around Honduran and Philadelphian culture

projects.title: Absolutely Abstract Exhibition - Philadelphia Sketch Club
projects.description: Painting displayed in Philadelphia Sketch Club's Juried "Absolutely Abstract" Exhibition. The piece was titled "Extinction Party I" and was displayed simultaneously to "Extinction Party II" being displayed at the Icebox Project Space.

projects.title: Now One With Everyone Exhibition - Icebox Project Space
projects.description: Painting displayed in Icebox Project Space's "Now One with Everyone" Exhibition. The piece was titled "Extinction Party II" and was displayed simultaneously to "Extinction Party I" being displayed at Philadelphia Sketch Club.

projects.title: Mural Arts 40th Anniversary Artwork
projects.description: Artwork created in tribute to the 40th Anniversary of Philadelphia's Mural Arts program and was posted to Mural Arts's social media page after a kick-off press event at REC Philly with renowned Philadelphia Artists Darryl McCray (Cornbread), Raheem Saladeen Johnson (King Saladeen), and Gianni Lee.

projects.title: CADS Visual and Applied Arts Exhibition
projects.description: Multidisciplinary submissions for CADS Visual and Applied Arts Showcase including 2 printed digital art pieces and 3 original paintings displayed for the visual arts portion, as well as a sculpture (clay on plastic) and shoes with hand-drawn designs presented in the Applied Arts portion. Digital Animations were also submitted to be displayed on the large display. The opening took Place at Drexel University over two days.

projects.title: WKDU 91.7FM Electronic Music Marathon 19th Anniversary Artwork
projects.description: An art piece created as a part of WKDU's 2023 Electronic Music Marathon, an annual event that raises money for non-profits around the city of Philadelphia. DJs from around the city volunteer time to play back to back over the course of over 80 hours live on air. This piece continues to hang at the entrance to the radio station.

projects.title: Projection Installation for Exhibition of Light and Sound
projects.description: Sound-Reactive Visualizer Installation displayed as a part of the Exhibition of Light and Sound
